heading: Limitations
label: 8214 Limitations
text: The Secretary may not use the authority under this subchapter to assist in the establishment of more than eight new medical schools. Such schools shall be located in geographically dispersed areas of the United States.
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–40section 5074 of this titlesubstituted “Secretary” for “Administrator”.Pub. L. 102–83
